UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile document containing base accounts registration data.

uid.description: Unique user credentials identifier in Firebase Authentication.

photoURL.description: Optional associated profile visual photo link.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: A secure, real-time message dispatched in the persistent network chat room.

id.description: Unique id matching collection path assignment key.

senderUid.description: Unique auth UID of dispatching operator.

senderEmail.description: Auth registered email of message dispatcher.

senderDisplayName.description: Optional human display label of dispatcher.

text.description: Decrypted contents containing standard human message data stream.

fileURL.description: Optional document/image attachment URL uploaded to Firebase Storage.

fileName.description: Optional attachment file baseline filename label.

SavedChatHistory.title: SavedChatHistory
SavedChatHistory.description: Archived session history corresponding to specific mode interactions.

userId.description: User UID who owns this history.

mode.description: The active mode: learn or create.

title.description: Summary descriptive title of the conversation.

timestamp.description: When the conversation history was saved.

Evaluation.title: Evaluation
Evaluation.description: User diagnostic onboarding cognitive assessment appraisal report.

uid.description: Optional user UID from authentication details.

/users/{userId}.description: A secure isolated index containing registered user details.

/chat_messages/{messageId}.description: Persistent shared cyber-terminal channel containing peer conversational loops.

/chat_histories/{historyId}.description: Persistent saved mode-specific communication logs index metadata.

/evaluations/{evaluationId}.description: Stores user diagnostic onboarding cognitive assessment appraisal reports.
